import * as React from 'react'; export type AwaitOptions<T> = { promise: Promise<T>; }; /** Suspend until a deferred promise resolves or rejects and return its data. */ export declare function useAwaited<T>({ promise: _promise }: AwaitOptions<T>): T; /** * Component that suspends on a deferred promise and renders its child with * the resolved value. Optionally provides a Suspense fallback. */ export declare function Await<T>(props: AwaitOptions<T> & { fallback?: React.ReactNode; children: (result: T) => React.ReactNode; }): import("react/jsx-runtime").JSX.Element;
